4001.name: 4 Leaf Circlet
4001.description: Silver circlet adorned with a green gemstone clover. Increases LUCK by 5 and Accuracy by 2. Despite its age it boasts a strange lack of aging

4002.name: Ancient Mask
4002.description: Crumbling mask, almost unusable. Increases STR by 5 and Accuracy by 2

4003.name: Ancient Hood
4003.description: Moth-eaten hood, almost unusable. Increases AGI by 5 and Accuracy by 2

4004.name: Ancient Veil
4004.description: Fading veil, almost unusable. Increases WIS by 5 and Accuracy by 2

4005.name: Ancient Cuirass
4005.description: Crumbling cuirass, almost unusable. Increases STR by 5 and Defense by 2

4006.name: Ancient Harness
4006.description: Moth-eaten harness, almost unusable. Increases AGI by 5 and Defense by 2

4007.name: Ancient Tunic
4007.description: Fading tunic, almost unusable. Increases WIS by 5 and Defense by 2

4008.name: Ancient Culottes
4008.description: Crumbling culottes, almost unusable. Increases STR by 6

4009.name: Ancient Subligar
4009.description: Moth-eaten subligar, almost unusable. Increases AGI by 6

4010.name: Ancient Gaskins
4010.description: Fading gaskins, almost unusable. Increases WIS by 6

4011.name: Ancient Sabatons
4011.description: Crumbling Sabatons, almost unusable. Increases STR by 5 and final Speed by 1%

4012.name: Ancient Longboots
4012.description: Moth-eaten Longboots, almost unusable. Increases AGI by 5 and Accuracy by 2 and final Speed by 1%

4013.name: Ancient Boots
4013.description: Fading Boots, almost unusable. Increases WIS by 5 and Accuracy by 2 and final Speed by 1%

4014.name: Rusty Knife
4014.description: Do not cut yourself  with it, unless you wanna die a slow death. Has a Weapon Power of 6. Increases LUCK by 2

4015.name: Ancient Sword
4015.description: Aged sword, almost unusable. Has a Weapon Power of 7. Increases LUCK by 5

4016.name: Ancient Axe
4016.description: Aged axe, almost unusable. Has a Weapon Power of 10. Increases STR by 5

4017.name: Ancient Bow
4017.description: Aged bow, almost unusable. Has a Weapon Power of 10. Increases AGI by 5

4018.name: Ancient Gromire
4018.description: Aged grimoire, almost unusable. Has a Weapon Power of 10. Increases WIS by 5
